title: ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. kochii
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. kochii, also known as the Star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. kochii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
